body_transformation: Slowpoke's plump body now wears a seamless layer of gunmetal gray steel plating, its smooth curves replaced by subtle engraved geometric patterns along the limbs and torso. The once-soft skin texture is transformed into a polished chrome surface with faint indigo energy lines tracing beneath the metallic shell. Its curled tail tip retains the spiral shape but now consists of interlocking steel rings with glowing blue circuitry patterns. The large round eyes remain intact but are encased in smooth steel lenses with deep indigo highlights, while the short legs feature reinforced mechanical joints with visible pistons.
signature_feature: Curled tail tip: interlocking steel rings with glowing blue circuitry patterns.
